mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, dish_id, quantity, price, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT oi.*, d.name as dishName, d.image as dishImage FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN dish d ON oi.dish_id = d.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
